indicators.name: Total Population
indicators.definition: Total civilian resident population

indicators.name: Poverty Rate
indicators.definition: % of residents below the federal poverty line

indicators.name: Uninsured Adults
indicators.definition: % of civilian noninstitutionalized population without health insurance

indicators.name: Renters — Cost Burdened (30%+ income on rent)
indicators.definition: Renter households spending 30%+ of income on gross rent

indicators.name: Renters — Severely Cost Burdened (50%+ income on rent)
Population with Low Income (Under 200% Poverty Level)
indicators.definition: % of population with income below 200% of the federal poverty line

indicators.notes: Suppress if fewer than 20 deaths — counts near threshold

indicators.definition: Fetal deaths per 1,000 live births + fetal deaths
